hdpe/evoh co-extrusion.name: HDPE/EVOH Co-extrusion
hdpe/evoh co-extrusion.notes: A multi-layer structure combining the moisture barrier of HDPE with the excellent oxygen barrier of EVOH.

hdpe/evoh coextrusion.name: HDPE/EVOH Coextrusion
hdpe/evoh coextrusion.notes: HDPE provides structure and moisture barrier while a thin coextruded EVOH layer provides an excellent gas barrier.
hdpe/evoh coextrusion.source_hint: MatWeb / typical published values for component materials

high-density polyethylene.name: High-Density Polyethylene
high-density polyethylene.notes: PCR content can introduce variability and may slightly reduce mechanical properties compared to 100% virgin resin.
high-density polyethylene.source_hint: MatWeb / typical published values for PCR blends

petg.name: PETG
petg.notes: Excellent clarity and toughness make it a common choice for thermoformed packaging like clamshells and blisters.

recycled polyethylene terephthalate.name: Recycled Polyethylene Terephthalate
recycled polyethylene terephthalate.notes: Properties can be slightly lower than virgin PET and vary based on feedstock quality and processing.

soda-lime glass.name: Soda-Lime Glass
soda-lime glass.notes: A brittle material whose practical tensile strength is limited by the presence of surface flaws.
